panels.description: Number of funnel windows processed in the past 15 minutes.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS windows_last_15m
FROM funnel_summary
WHERE window_end >= date_trunc('minute', NOW()) - INTERVAL '15 minutes'
  AND window_end < date_trunc('minute', NOW());

panels.title: Windows Processed (last 15m)

panels.description: Clock-skew-tolerant visibility latency in milliseconds between producer timestamp and latest visibility in RisingWave src_page.
panels.title: Producer -> RW latency

panels.description: Viewer transactions per second over the last 30 seconds.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    COUNT(*)::double precision
      / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(produced_at) - MIN(produced_at))), 0),
    0
  ) AS viewers_tps
FROM src_page
WHERE produced_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 seconds';

panels.title: Viewers TPS

panels.description: History of viewers, carters, and purchasers as per-minute rates, sampled every 5 seconds.

targets.rawSql:
WITH viewers AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(produced_at, '5s'),
    (COUNT(*) * 12)::bigint AS viewers
  FROM src_page
  WHERE $__timeFilter(produced_at)
  GROUP BY 1
),
carters AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(produced_at, '5s'),
    (COUNT(*) * 12)::bigint AS carters
  FROM src_cart
  WHERE $__timeFilter(produced_at)
  GROUP BY 1
),
purchasers AS (
  SELECT
    $__timeGroupAlias(produced_at, '5s'),
    (COUNT(*) * 12)::bigint AS purchasers
  FROM src_purchase
  WHERE $__timeFilter(produced_at)
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(viewers.time, carters.time, purchasers.time) AS "time",
  COALESCE(viewers.viewers, 0) AS viewers,
  COALESCE(carters.carters, 0) AS carters,
  COALESCE(purchasers.purchasers, 0) AS purchasers
FROM viewers
FULL OUTER JOIN carters ON viewers.time = carters.time
FULL OUTER JOIN purchasers ON COALESCE(viewers.time, carters.time) = purchasers.time
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Viewers / Carters / Purchasers history (per min, 5s refresh)

panels.description: Latest 20 processed windows and conversion metrics.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  window_start,
  window_end,
  viewers,
  carters,
  purchasers,
  view_to_cart_rate,
  cart_to_buy_rate
FROM funnel_summary
ORDER BY window_end DESC
LIMIT 20;

panels.title: Latest Processed Windows
